name: X Twitter
description: OAuth 2.0 PKCE auth + following timeline reader for X (Twitter). Reads home timeline, following list, and per-user tweets using user-context credentials.

clientId.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from the X Developer Portal.

clientSecret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret (required for token refresh).

callbackPort.description: Local port for the OAuth callback server (default: 47832).

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.help: From X Developer Portal > Your App > Keys and Tokens > OAuth 2.0 Client ID.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.help: Required for refreshing access tokens without re-auth.

callbackPort.label: Callback Port
callbackPort.help: Local port used during the OAuth browser flow. Register http://localhost:<port>/callback in your X app settings.
